direct_fit_reading: direct fit now means both dense repeated burden and raw nightly support that beats the IFH raw anchor; strong raw alone is not enough

primary_wave.name: Brigham and Women's Hospital
primary_wave.subject: Raw nightly stress collaboration around participant-night sleep and physiology
primary_wave.exact_ask: one cohort with participant-night rows, repeated stress or closely related burden, raw or epoch cardiovascular sidecars, and enough metadata to estimate raw night fraction plus mean raw coverage before transfer

primary_wave.name: Northwestern Center for Circadian & Sleep Medicine
primary_wave.subject: Potential collaboration on participant-night sleep, repeated stress, and wearable physiology
primary_wave.exact_ask: one sleep or circadian cohort with participant-night structure, repeated burden, nightly wearable or physiological signal, and enough detail to complete the dual-frontier pre-screen

primary_wave.name: Scripps Digital Trials Center
primary_wave.subject: Feasibility review for a raw nightly stress cohort using remote wearable data
primary_wave.exact_ask: one remote cohort export with nightly sleep, HR or HRV-related signal, repeated burden, defensible linkage, and enough facts to estimate raw night fraction plus mean raw coverage

primary_wave.name: Stanford Center for Sleep and Circadian Sciences
primary_wave.subject: Participant-night sleep and physiology cohort fit for a targeted transport study
primary_wave.exact_ask: one CSCS-linked cohort with participant-night sleep rows or recoverable timestamps, repeated burden, cardiovascular sidecar, and enough metadata to estimate raw-support quality before transfer

primary_wave.name: Hospital Clínic Barcelona — Unit of Sleep
primary_wave.subject: Research collaboration on participant-night sleep, repeated stress, and physiology-rich nightly interpretation
primary_wave.exact_ask: one sleep-unit cohort with participant-night sleep, repeated burden, cardiovascular or biomarker-linked nightly signal, and enough detail to estimate raw-support quality before transfer

reserve.name: Duke Population Research Institute
reserve.reason: good stress-plus-wearable bridge, but less clearly sleep-first than the primary five

first_positive_reply_step: request the factual pre-screen fields before asking for a full bundle
first_positive_reply_fields: PSG or richer physiology subset exists
